originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__xGridSpacing_2' during its initialization is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'xGridSpacing' during its initialization is never read
reasoning: xGridSpacing is assigned at L24 from left_probe_bed_position but is never subsequently read — genuine dead store. No // ERROR at L24 (the // ERROR at L21 marks left_probe_bed_position). New bug. PC = ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING, which is the single real feature flag controlling the #ifdef block at L23. Correctly constrained, no library macros.
